calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Xiu Ying Lin was present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the minors Yan Fei Zeng and Xu Hui Zeng, who were also present at today's hearing.
The minors' father was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minors were placed under oath and examined.
Yan Fei Zeng was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Linda Xiuling Lin.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Angel Yan Fei Zeng and Jacky Xu Hui Zeng.

Decree Changing Names were submitted to and signed by the Court.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Text Ruling
